feedback.text: Hello, I support this initiative, but hope in particular that it will finally make it possible to legislate on the right of consumers to actually own what they buy, as in all other sales areas in the world. It is of paramount importance to prevent companies from abusing their quasi-monopoly position in order to put what they actually treat as rental as selling (for example, video games, which are paid as a purchase but can suddenly not only be withdrawn from sale but also make it impossible for people who have bought them to play). Warmly,
